title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Dental Plaque
description: Melaleuca alternifolia tinctures contains compounds like cineole, limonene, and beta-pinene. These bioactive constituents have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that help prevent the growth of bacteria that cause dental plaque. Cineole, in particular, has been shown to inhibit the formation of biofilms, which are communities of bacteria that adhere to tooth surfaces.
